title: Remaining here-be-dragons: process.env coupling, missing caveats
issueDisposition: Umbrella tracker; audit current base branch and prior PRs before treating any stream as residual.
candidateResidualStreams: WeakMap tool disposal ownership and copied/recreated tool arrays
piWrapper lazy init retry storms and backoff/circuit-breaker behavior
portable shell selection while preserving explicit bash opt-in
agent-mux orchestration, hook-mux lifecycle, and trigger dispatch E2E coverage gaps
duplicated utility patterns around platform detection, path normalization, and config loading
staticGuards: No unexplained it.skip entries remain in packages/agent-mux/ui/src/screens/SessionDetailScreen.test.tsx.
Any deferred residual stream has an explicit follow-up acceptance criterion.
Docs updates reflect only work actually fixed or explicitly split.
nonGoals: Do not duplicate #584 process.env coupling work.
Do not duplicate #586 kanban exhaustiveness work.
Do not overwrite PR #716 process artifacts without a maintainer decision.
Do not add migrations, API routes, SDK dependencies, or new environment variables unless runtime evidence proves they are necessary.
